---
title: "Instructor Only: Saving Visualizations Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
states <- readr::read_csv("data/real/state_population_ranks.csv")

top_states <- states |>
  slice_max(population, n = 10) |>
  mutate(state_name = reorder(state_name, population))

final_plot <- ggplot(top_states, aes(x = state_name, y = population)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Largest States In The Population Rank Dataset",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Population"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

final_plot

saved_file <- file.path(tempdir(), "top-states-practice-reference.png")

ggsave(
  filename = saved_file,
  plot = final_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

saved_file
```
